utterances.speaker: Lydia
utterances.text: So how did you know I was even here ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_how did you know I was even here ?

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: Your mom called me . So is this her ?

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: I am sorry you had to do this by yourself .

emotion_cause.span: 4_you had to do this by yourself .

utterances.speaker: Lydia
utterances.text: I was not by myself . I had a doctor , a nurse , and a helper guy . So , did you see who won the game ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_I was not by myself . I had a doctor , a nurse , and a helper guy .

utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: Yeah , the Knicks by 10 . They suck .

utterances.speaker: Lydia
utterances.text: Yeah , they are not so bad .
